nasb.text: You, O king, are the king of kings, to whom the God of heaven has given the kingdom, the power, the strength and the glory;

esv.text: You, O king, the king of kings, to whom the God of heaven has given the kingdom, the power, and the might, and the glory,

cnv.text: 王啊！你是萬王之王，天上的　神已經把國度、權柄、能力和尊榮都賜給你；

ccb.text: 王啊，你是万王之王，天上的上帝已将国度、权柄、能力和尊荣赐给你，
